fact: SQLAlchemy expire_on_commit=True (default) — always db.refresh(obj) before reading attributes post-commit
SQLite ignores FK constraints unless PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON is set per connection — not set at engine level
passlib[bcrypt] is incompatible with bcrypt>=4 on Python 3.14 — use bcrypt directly instead
pydantic-core 2.9.2 has no wheel for Python 3.14 — use pydantic>=2.13.4 which ships pydantic-core 2.46+
gh label command not available in older gh CLI versions — use gh api repos/owner/repo/labels instead
gh project add-item requires project scope in token — run: gh auth refresh -s project
CORSMiddleware without allow_credentials=True blocks all browser requests that include Authorization header
